title: Photo
bodyHtml:
FJ wants to take pictures of his N cows (2 <= N <= 1,000,000,000), which are standing in a line and conveniently numbered 1..N. Each photograph can capture a consecutive range of cows from the lineup, and FJ wants to make sure that each cow appears in at least one photo. Unfortunately, there are K unfriendly pairs of cows (1 <= K <= 1000) that each refuse to be in the same photograph. Given the locations of these unfriendly pairs, please determine the minimum number of photos FJ needs to take.

Unfortunately, there are K unfriendly pairs of cows (1 <= K <= 1000) that each refuse to be in the same photograph.  Given the locations of these unfriendly pairs, please determine the minimum number of photos FJ needs to take.
